reviews.author: Anvika Karmarkar
reviews.body: Bracelet ka crystal aur chain combination bahut unique laga. Har outfit ke saath easily match ho jata hai.

reviews.author: Ishaan Raut
reviews.body: Stylish accessories pasand karne walon ke liye yeh bracelet perfect option hai. Design bahut impressive laga.

reviews.author: Aarush Bhandarkar
reviews.body: Bracelet ka design bahut hi elegant aur premium laga. Rice chain ke saath crystal detailing wrist par bahut classy look deti hai. ✨

reviews.author: Shanaya Gavhane
reviews.body: Bracelet wrist par perfectly fit hua aur long hours tak pehenne ke baad bhi heavy feel nahi hua.

sections.heading: Product Description
sections.text:
A Symbol of Calmness, Balance & Peaceful Energy!

Elegant, meaningful, and easy to wear, the Anxiety Free Rice Bracelet is designed with a premium 24K gold-toned rice chain that gives it a clean, luxurious, and stylish jewellery look. Its sleek rice chain pattern makes it perfect for daily styling, while the calming crystal beads add a deeper peace-focused purpose.

This rice chain bracelet features a soothing crystal combination:

→ Amethyst – Traditionally associated with stress relief, relaxation, calmness, and peaceful energy.

→ Amazonite – Symbolizes balance, harmony, emotional clarity, and gentle strength.

→ Opalite – Associated with emotional balance, inner peace, soothing energy, and gentle positivity.

→ Howlite – Represents patience, tranquillity, a peaceful mind, and relaxed energy.

Together, the 24K gold-toned rice chain, secure lobster lock, and calming crystals create a stylish everyday bracelet with a soft, peaceful, and emotionally balanced feel.

Perfect for daily wear, work, travel, meditation, self-care moments, or gifting, this bracelet is made for those who love jewellery that looks elegant while carrying a calm and meaningful intention.

Note: As crystals are natural, slight variations in colour, size, texture, and finish may occur.

Disclaimer: The Anxiety Free Rice Bracelet is designed to support calmness, balance, peaceful energy, and positive intention through belief and mindful practice. Results may vary from person to person depending on mindset, lifestyle, actions, and personal effort. This product is not meant to replace medical advice, therapy, or professional treatment.

sections.heading: Product Details
sections.text:
Calming Crystal Combination: 

Made with Amethyst, Amazonite, Opalite, and Howlite to support calmness, balance, patience, and peaceful energy.

24K Gold-Toned Rice Chain: 

Premium rice chain design gives the bracelet a sleek, textured, and luxurious jewellery look.

Lobster Lock Closure: 

Designed with a secure lobster lock for easy wearing and a comfortable wrist fit.

Handcrafted Quality Finish: 

Carefully handcrafted with selected crystal beads for a meaningful, aesthetic, and premium finish.

sections.heading: Hero Ingredients
sections.text:
• Amethyst Crystal - Traditionally associated with stress relief, relaxation, calmness, and peaceful energy.

• Amazonite Crystal - Symbolizes balance, harmony, emotional clarity, and gentle strength.

• Opalite - Associated with emotional balance, inner peace, soothing energy, and gentle positivity.

• Howlite Crystal - Represents patience, tranquility, relaxation, and a peaceful mind.

• 24K Gold-Toned Rice Chain - Gives the bracelet a premium golden shine with a sleek textured look.

• Lobster Lock Closure - Helps provide secure, easy, and comfortable wear.

sections.heading: Product Benefits
sections.text:
• Calm Energy

Amethyst and Opalite are associated with relaxation, calmness, and peaceful emotional energy.

• Emotional Balance

Amazonite symbolizes harmony, balance, and emotional clarity for a more centred feeling.

• Peaceful Mind

Howlite represents patience, tranquillity, and a relaxed state of mind.

• Gentle Positivity

Opalite is associated with inner peace, emotional softness, soothing energy, and gentle positivity.

• Premium Everyday Styling

The 24K gold-toned rice chain gives the bracelet a clean, stylish, and luxurious look.
